blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,576 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.7" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
